panel.empty_library: Save a variant from any image node to start your library.
settings.nano_banana_pro_hint: GEM_PIX_2 — premium, higher fidelity, slightly slower
settings.veo_lite_hint: Fastest generation, lightest model. Applies to both 16:9 and 9:16.
settings.veo_fast_hint: Default — balanced fidelity and speed. Applies to both 16:9 and 9:16.
settings.veo_quality_hint: Highest fidelity, slowest. Best for hero shots. Applies to both 16:9 and 9:16.
settings.veo_lite_relaxed_hint: Same Lite checkpoint, low-priority queue — 0 credits. Slower turnaround when Flow is busy.
settings.title: Settings
settings.tier_hint: Auto-detected from Google Flow when the first project loads.
settings.omni_flash_hint: Reference-image to video. Variable duration (4 / 6 / 8 / 10s) picked per dispatch — 15 / 20 / 25 / 30 credits. Portrait + landscape supported.
sidebar.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
sidebar.flow_sync_label: Push every local board up to Google Flow — creates a Flow project for any board that's missing one
sidebar.flow_sync_title: Sync local boards up to Google Flow
sidebar.orphan_badge: Flow project not found — rebind required
sidebar.new_project_hint: Name shown in sidebar. Can be changed later.
sidebar.delete_permanent_hint: This project will be permanently deleted along with all its nodes, edges, generations, and assets. This cannot be undone.
node.composing_hint: Backend is still composing — try again in a moment
node.connect_downstream_first: Connect this image to a downstream image/video target first.
node.prompt_placeholder: Style direction (e.g. cinematic warm tone, magazine editorial mood). Connect into image/video to feed downstream auto-prompt.
node.save_asset_to_library_title: Save this asset to the library
node.save_char_to_library_title: Save this character to the library
node.save_variant_to_library_title: Save this variant to the library
node.use_variant_ref_title: Use this variant as the reference for a downstream node
gen.tier_unknown: Open Flow once so the extension can detect your plan, then retry. (See the Tier-unknown banner in the bottom-left.)
gen.omni_no_ingredients: Omni Flash needs at least one ingredient (connect an upstream Character / Image / Visual asset).
gen.veo_no_source: Veo i2v requires a source image (connect an upstream image node)
error.paygate_tier_unknown: Flowboard doesn't know your Google Flow plan tier yet — the extension hasn't seen a Flow request that exposes it. Open https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow in a tab and reload it once, then retry. Flowboard refuses to dispatch in this state to avoid silently serving Ultra users at the Pro checkpoint.
error.upload_no_media_id: Google Flow accepted the upload but didn't return a media handle — this usually means the image was silently rejected by Flow's content filter (logos, watermarks, copyrighted brand imagery). Try a different image or download it locally and upload as a file. Check the agent terminal for the full Flow response.
error.captcha_no_window: Chrome has no open windows for the extension to attach a Flow tab to. Open any Chrome window (or click the extension's '⋯ → Open Flow') and retry — Flowboard will reuse the existing window automatically.
activity.empty: No activity yet. Run a generation or open Auto-Prompt to populate the feed.
sponsor.title: Sponsor Flowboard
sponsor.subtitle: Become a sponsor and appear in the top of our Git repository. Your name (and logo at higher tiers) is credited in the README and the in-app sponsors panel.
sponsor.fineprint_prefix: Payments go directly to the maintainer. After Ko-fi (or PayPal) confirms, email the receipt + your preferred display name to
sponsor.fineprint_suffix: and we'll add you to the README within 48 hours.
provider.force_banner: Flowboard needs an AI provider before it can run Auto-Prompt, Vision, or Planner. Pick one card, run all 3 tests green, then Apply to continue.
provider.claude_intro: Flowboard uses your existing Claude subscription via the official CLI — no API key needed.
provider.claude_auth_hint: Opens a browser for OAuth — sign in with your Claude account.
provider.claude_note: Once installed + authenticated, the Claude row above flips to ✓ Connected automatically (the panel polls every 30s).
provider.gemini_intro: Flowboard uses your existing Gemini subscription via the official CLI — no API key needed.
provider.gemini_note: Once authenticated, the Gemini row will flip to ✓ Connected on the next 30s poll.
provider.openai_cli_intro: ChatGPT Plus or Pro subscription required.
provider.openai_cli_note: If your Codex version is text-only, you can add an OpenAI API key below as a Vision fallback in the OpenAI row above.
provider.openai_api_intro: For users without ChatGPT Plus or Pro.
provider.openai_api_save_hint: Paste in the OpenAI row above and click Save.
provider.openai_api_note: The key stays in ~/.flowboard/secrets.json (mode 600, local only) and is never sent anywhere except api.openai.com.
result.no_url_hint: Open your project on labs.google/flow so Flowboard can capture the image URL.
result.video_regen_needs_upstream: Video re-gen needs an upstream image with rendered media.
result.variant_blocked_hint: This variant was rejected by Google's safety filter. The other variants in this batch rendered normally — try re-running just this slot, or tweak the upstream image / prompt to avoid the trigger.
result.composing_wait: Backend is composing — try again in a moment
result.composing_actions_disabled: Composing prompt — actions disabled until done
result.analyzing_actions_disabled: Analyzing image — actions disabled until done
result.backend_busy: Backend is busy on this node — try again in a moment
result.clone_title: Clone this node onto the canvas with the same upstream refs
result.wait_for_gen: Wait for the generation to finish
result.save_ref_library: Save this variant to the cross-board Reference library
dialog.video_prompt_placeholder: Leave blank to auto-generate a motion prompt from the source image ✨
dialog.prompt_node_placeholder: Enter a seed prompt to feed downstream image / video nodes…
dialog.image_prompt_placeholder: Leave blank to auto-generate a prompt from upstream nodes ✨
dialog.locked_storyboard_title: Locked: storyboard motion template (animates panels in order)
dialog.storyboard_locked_hint: 🎬 Storyboard motion template — locked because an upstream Storyboard node is feeding this video. Flow animates the composite panels in order (frame 1 → {{panels}}). Other refs (character / location / visual_asset) still flow through normally.
dialog.extras_tip: Prompt is auto-built: portrait headshot · vibe styling · photorealistic — optimized for character reference.
dialog.select_at_least_one: Select at least 1 variant to generate video.
dialog.no_source_image: Connect an upstream image node with rendered media first
dialog.omni_info_tip: Omni Flash dispatches via video:batchAsyncGenerateVideoReferenceImages with the upstream image(s) as IMAGE_USAGE_TYPE_ASSET refs. Duration scales credit cost: 4s=15, 6s=20, 8s=25, 10s=30.
dialog.model_tip: Sticky — your selection is remembered across dispatches (synced with Settings). Veo uses i2v (1 source image); Omni Flash uses reference ingredients (multiple images) with duration 4/6/8/10s chosen below.
dialog.camera_tip: Static = locked-off camera; cinematic = subtle motion; dynamic = active camera moves.
dialog.grid_tip: Storyboard renders as a SINGLE composite image — Flow draws the whole grid as one picture. The topic field above is your story; the locked template wraps it for you. For 2×3 / 2×4 the rows × cols flip with the aspect ratio so panels stay readable on both landscape and portrait composites.
dialog.composing_wait: Backend is still composing — try again in a moment
account.scan_hint_text: Refresh the Flow tab, then reload the Flowboard extension.
account.scan_again_title: Scan again for an extension connection
account.scan_title: Scan for an extension connection and re-fetch user info
account.tier_unknown_text: Open Flow once so the extension can detect your plan.
provider.cli_not_signed_in: The CLI is installed but not signed in. Open Setup help for the login command.
provider.cli_install_hint: Install the CLI from npm and sign in. Open Setup help for the exact commands.
provider.apply_title_needs_test: Run the connection test successfully to enable Apply.
provider.test_hint: Sends one tiny prompt to verify the CLI answers.
provider.setup_tooltip: Pick an AI provider to power Auto-Prompt, Vision, and Planner.
settings.language_picker_desc: Choose the language Flowboard's UI is displayed in.
settings.logout_hint: Clears the cached identity and tells the extension to drop its in-memory token. The WebSocket stays open so signing back in doesn't require a Chrome restart.
refs.confirm_delete_title: Click again to confirm — auto-cancels in 3s
wizard.can_generate_hint: Fill in at least ethnicity, vibe, or extras to generate.
wizard.draft_restored_hint: Draft restored from your last session.
wizard.error.preset_cap: Preset library is full (50 max). Delete a preset before saving a new one.
wizard.error.preset_load_corrupt: One or more saved presets could not be loaded — data may be corrupt. Affected presets have been removed.
wizard.error.preset_name_empty: Please enter a name for this preset.
wizard.error.preset_save_failed: Could not save preset — storage may be full. Try deleting an existing preset.
wizard.field.age.label: Age Range
wizard.field.ethnicity.info_tip: Select a region or type any description. Your text goes directly into the prompt.
wizard.field.ethnicity.label: Ethnicity
wizard.field.expression.label: Expression
wizard.field.extras.label: Extras
wizard.field.extras.placeholder: Additional details for the prompt… (200 chars max)
wizard.field.gender.label: Gender
wizard.field.hair_color.label: Hair Color
wizard.field.hair_style.label: Hair Style
wizard.field.outfit.label: Outfit Hint
wizard.field.outfit.placeholder: e.g. business formal, streetwear, traditional dress…
wizard.field.skin_tone.label: Skin Tone
wizard.field.vibe.label: Vibe
wizard.preset.shelf_empty: No saved presets yet. Fill the wizard and save one from the Review step.
wizard.review.prompt_empty: Fill in some fields above to preview the prompt.
wizard.review.prompt_hint: This is exactly what gets sent to generation.
wizard.title: Character
